creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From /usr/local/etc/gitup.conf with 0.90_1: 

----

        "ports" : {
                "host"       : "github.com",
                "repository" : "/freebsd/freebsd-ports.git",
                "branch"     : "master",
                "target"     : "/usr/ports",
                "ignores"    : [
                        "distfiles",
                        "packages",
                ],
        },

        "quarterly" : {
                "host"       : "github.com",
                "repository" : "/freebsd/freebsd-ports.git",
                "branch"     : "quarterly",
                "target"     : "/usr/ports",
                "ignores"    : [
                        "distfiles",
                        "packages",
                ]
        },


----

Re: <https://wiki.freebsd.org/git> this can change when <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/> goes live. 

Something like: 

----

        "ports" : {
                "repository" : "/ports.git",
                "branch"     : "main",
                "target"     : "/usr/ports",
                "ignores"    : [
                        "distfiles",
                        "packages",
                ],
        },

        "quarterly" : {
                "repository" : "/ports.git",
                "branch"     : "2021Q1",
                "target"     : "/usr/ports",
                "ignores"    : [
                        "distfiles",
                        "packages",
                ]
        },

----

… I don't know about the ignores.

Thanks
